title: Playground Repair Notice Incident Review
intent: Route a resident-facing playground repair into incident review when the active closure notice becomes inaccurate during execution and alternate access is blocked.

notes: The incident-review notice records synthetic closure and detour facts only; it does not store resident identity, unit numbers, camera feeds, access tokens, or worker personal data.

fallback.condition: The repair closure starts while the previous resident notice is inaccurate, or the named alternate route is blocked.
fallback.action: Pause the repair window, publish an updated resident notice, open incident review, and keep a human operator contact path available.

artifacts.description: Synthetic incident report explaining why the active playground repair notice was no longer accurate during execution.
Plain-language synthetic resident notice update that explains the pause, blocked alternate route, and operator contact path.
